purpose: Single source of banned module specifiers for the IDD/Inceptor stack. centinela's forbidden-import scan and src/tests/forbidden-imports.test.ts both read THIS file — change a rule here, not in prose. Each `pattern` matches an import specifier (prefix match for scopes ending in '/').

banned.reason: Base UI is the chosen primitive layer; never mix Radix with Base UI.
Use Tremor Raw (copy-paste) so it tree-shakes and we own the source.
